name: Name
languageSettingsDescription: Select your preferred language. The entire interface will automatically translate to your chosen language.
languageNoteMessage: Your language preference is saved automatically and will persist across sessions. The interface will translate immediately when you select a new language.
noMatchingRequests: No matching blood group requests within 50km.
noDifferentRequests: No other requested blood groups within 50km.
noOtherRequests: No other requested blood groups found.
markAsAvailable: Mark as available to get notified instantly when matching blood requests are posted near you.
requestBloodDescription: Need blood? Post a request and connect with nearby donors instantly.
mediBotDescription: Your AI healthcare assistant for blood donation queries
phoneRequiredMessage: Your profile is missing a phone number which is required to confirm donations. Please update your profile.
failedToCreateOffer: Failed to create offer on server
geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation not supported by your browser.
destinationNotAvailable: Destination coordinates not available for this request.
checkEmailMessage: Please check your email to confirm your donation pledge.
completeProfileMessage: To continue with donations, please fill out your profile details (Phone & Blood Group) — it helps us match you with requests. Thank you!
heroQuote: Real heroes don't wear capes — they donate blood
donationCompletedMessage: Great job! We have sent a verification email to the requester. Your rewards will be credited once they confirm.
cancellationProcessedMessage: Don't worry! Your cancellation has been processed.
noActiveMissions: No active heroic missions at the moment.
completionDialogMessage: You have done a great job! Your rewards will be added in a couple of days after we verify with the requester.
cancelDonationMessage: You may have work, don't worry! Make a donation next time.
noRewardsYet: No rewards accumulated yet. Begin your journey today!
shareMessage: I've saved {{lives}} lives donating blood on Real-Hero! Join me and become a hero too!
uploadPhotoParams: Supported: jpg/png/webp — Max 2 MB. If your image is larger, reduce dimensions or select a compressed format.
profileLoadError: Unable to load profile from server. Please try logging in again.
imageTooLargeError: Image too large. Please upload an image smaller than 2MB (profiles are base64 encoded).
passwordResetInfo: Password reset is currently only available via the Forgot Password link on the Login page.
requestAutoRemoveNote: Note: Requests are automatically removed after 7 days.
receivedBloodMessage: We are so happy you received the blood! Would you like to close this request now?
mediBotSubtitle: Your medical companion for blood donation queries
mediBotIntro: Hello! I am MediBot 🤖. I can help you with blood donation queries and speak in Indian languages. How can I assist you today?
mediBotError: ⚠️ Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
mediBotNetworkError: ⚠️ Network error. Please check your connection.
noLeaderboardData: No leaderboard data yet. Start donating to appear here!
